title: Mythic Weapons
description: Adds mythic weapons with custom abilities & passive effects
body:
This plugin contains 4 custom mythic weapons, That have their own abilities & passive effects.
This plugin is made for SMP usage, but is freely usable on anything.

Using the /mythicweapon give command you can get these weapons:


![23](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0980d6a1550837a58a2bae999b20a6be2c182c66.png)


> **Dragon Mace**
> 
> Removing fall damage while held
> Ability1: Dragon like dash to the direction your looking at!
> Ability2: Teleport to a player to switch places ( upto 100 blocks ( changeable )

> **Blood Blade**
> 
> Every hit has 10% chance to make enemies bleed
> Ability1: Dash through opponents to deal damage
> Ability2: Gain strength 3!

> **Frozen Crossbow**
> 
> Arrows have 10% chance to freeze enemies
> Ability1: 2 next arrows will freeze enemies 100%
> Ability2: Gain invulnerability since your frozen!

> **Void Trident**
> 
> Trident has 10% chance to blind enemies
> Ability1: Summon a black hole that sucks players inside
> Ability2: Leap to become true invisible ( not showing armors etc )

Every cooldown & radius / damage etc can be changed from config.yml file!
There is /trust & /untrust to not deal damage to allied players!

This Plugin is mainly made for SMP purposes, since it adds some unique PVP weapons that can be used on the newest version on MINECRAFT. Its similar to kings smp etc! This is the perfect free plugin for an SMP to use with no BUGS / easily configurable settings!

Install the plugin -> drop to plugins folder.
You can change cooldowns / range / damage / everything through the config.yml file!

Abilities can be found [here](https://modrinth.com/plugin/mythic-weapons/gallery)
Happy smp'ing



![Mythic Weapons 1.21.10](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc0b5857bd4c1ef05992ba2c2dc3579223c45332.png)
